top_signals.title: Carlyle's Thomas Sees BOJ Hiking Rates in June
top_signals.summary: Carlyle Global Research and Investment Strategy Head Jason Thomas expects the Bank of Japan to hike interest rates in June this year. He speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Novak Djokovic hoping to turn back clock at French Open
top_signals.summary: Djokovic has played in just three tournaments in 2026, and he lost his only match on clay
